title: Croatian Flatbread Pizza
description: A simple and delicious Croatian-inspired flatbread pizza with a spicy twist. Perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Top the flatbread with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Drizzle the fiery sauce over the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
